title: antennaria dioica
intro: Antennaria dioica, also known as mountain everlasting or lupine everlasting, is a flowering plant species native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and other minor injuries. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Antennaria dioica can be prepared in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
